task_updates.executor_notes: Expanded the `create_task` schema to 10 task types total by adding `image-to-image`, `magic-edit`, `image-upscale`, `video-enhance`, and `character-animate`. Added optional `model`, `video_url`, and `strength` properties, broadened the `reference_image_urls` description to all image-input paths, and made `prompt` conditionally described instead of globally required. The model enum uses the T1-confirmed strings `wan-2.2`, `qwen-image`, `z-image`, `ltx-2.3`, and `ltx-2.3-fast`.

Extended `CreateGenerationTaskArgs` with `video_url`, `strength`, `based_on`, and `generation_id`. Added builder functions for `z_image_turbo_i2i`, `magic_edit`, `image_upscale`, `video_enhance`, and `character_animate`, each emitting the resolver-expected keys only: `image_url/prompt/strength/numImages/shot_id/based_on` for img2img, `prompt/image_url/numImages/shot_id/based_on` for magic edit, `image_url/generation_id/shot_id` for upscale, `video_url/enable_interpolation/enable_upscale/shot_id/based_on` for video enhance, and `character_image_url/motion_video_url/mode/resolution/prompt` for character animate. Updated routing to send each task type to its family, mapped friendly travel model IDs to worker model names, and used the confirmed `480p` default for character animate.

Expanded `SUPPORTED_CREATE_TASK_TYPES` to the same 10-value surface as the schema. Prompt validation is now per-type so `image-upscale`, `video-enhance`, and `character-animate` can omit prompts while existing prompt-driven paths still require them. Added validation splits for image references, multi-image travel, and `video_url`, plus `strength` range checking. The tool now derives lineage from selected clips and passes `model_name`, `video_url`, `strength`, `based_on`, and `generation_id` through to `createGenerationTask`, while also including a selected video clip in shot lookup for video-enhance.

Updated the system prompt with a model-selection guide, a task-type guide covering the five new paths, and concrete `create_task` examples for `image-to-image`, `magic-edit`, `image-upscale`, `video-enhance`, and `character-animate`. The examples use the exact schema param names (`model`, `reference_image_urls`, `video_url`, `strength`) and the T1-confirmed model IDs, including `z-image` for text-to-image and `ltx-2.3` for image-to-video.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `tool-schemas.ts` now exposes exactly 10 `task_type` values, and the `model` enum uses the T1-confirmed IDs `wan-2.2`, `qwen-image`, `z-image`, `ltx-2.3`, and `ltx-2.3-fast`.
Yes. Each new builder in `generation.ts` was matched against the corresponding resolver contract from T1 and emits the resolver-specific keys rather than a generic payload shape.

Yes. `create-task.ts` now separates prompt-required types, reference-image-required types, `image-to-video`'s 2+ image requirement, and `video_url`-required types without loosening validation for the older prompt-driven paths.
Yes. The prompt examples use the exact schema field names from T2 (`model`, `reference_image_urls`, `video_url`, `strength`) and the exact T1-confirmed model IDs, including `z-image` and `ltx-2.3`.
